title: base-ref validated as commit-ish via rev-parse --verify, typed WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND (review P3, D3)
action: In skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/worktree-store.mjs createFeatureWorktree: replace git check-ref-format --allow-onelevel validation of baseRef with git rev-parse --verify --end-of-options "<baseRef>^{commit}" (argv array; --end-of-options requires git >= 2.24 — note the floor in a code comment, bee already targets modern git — advisor R8); failure -> typed WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND, zero mutation; on success pass the RESOLVED sha to git worktree add (deterministic, immune to ref moving mid-command — document the choice). Tests in scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs: HEAD, HEAD~1, short sha, tag^{commit} accepted; nonexistent/garbage -> WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND zero-mutation; leading-dash injection still refused; UPDATE the existing assertion at ~:362-364 expecting WORKTREE_INVALID_BASE_REF to the new code (advisor R8). Sync worktree-store.mjs mirrors + manifest.

truths: HEAD~1, short shas, and tag^{commit} forms are accepted as base refs
nonexistent/garbage refs yield typed WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND with zero mutation
leading-dash and injection-shaped inputs remain refused

verify: node scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_worktree_store.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs

trace.outcome: base-ref resolved as commit-ish via rev-parse --verify --end-of-options; resolved sha drives worktree add and is surfaced in output; single typed WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND (INVALID code retired); injection still neutralized; independent verify green on main 735ae56
trace.verification_evidence:
# p162-3 — done report (base-ref rev-parse resolution)

Worker: p162-3-worker (sonnet, isolated harness worktree, rebased onto main
d3a7a03). Worker commit `d20faeb`, merged into main as `735ae56`. 2026-07-19.

## What shipped
- `createFeatureWorktree`: `resolveBaseRefCommit` runs `git rev-parse
  --verify --end-of-options "<ref>^{commit}"` (argv array; git >= 2.24 floor
  noted); failure → typed `WORKTREE_BASE_NOT_FOUND`, zero mutation; the
  RESOLVED sha feeds `git worktree add` (deterministic even if the ref moves
  mid-command); return carries `baseRef`/`baseRefSha`, surfaced in CLI
  JSON/text; registry help text updated.
- `WORKTREE_INVALID_BASE_REF` retired: rev-parse cannot distinguish bad
  syntax from nonexistent, so all unresolvable inputs (garbage, missing refs,
  dash-injection) collapse into the single typed refusal — old assertion
  updated.
- Tests: HEAD / HEAD~1 / short sha / v1.2.0^{commit} accepted with exact
  resolved-sha assertions; nonexistent + garbage + `--upload-pack=/bin/sh`
  injection → typed zero-mutation refusals. `--end-of-options` neutralizing
  dash-injection verified empirically.
- Mirrors 4-way + rendered trees + manifest regenerated.

## Verification (fresh command output)
Independent orchestrator re-run on main after merge 735ae56:
worktree_cli 117/117; worktree_store 22/22; bee_cli 180/0; lib_mirror all
PASS; manifest 354 match → P1623_VERIFY_GREEN.
